spoiler_tiers.label: Arrival on Arrakis
spoiler_tiers.description: Paul arrives. The spice. The desert.

spoiler_tiers.label: Among the Fremen
spoiler_tiers.description: Paul joins the Fremen. Stilgar. Chani.

spoiler_tiers.label: Muad'Dib Rises
spoiler_tiers.description: Paul becomes Muad'Dib. The holy war begins.

spoiler_tiers.label: Dune Complete
spoiler_tiers.description: First book or both films complete.

spoiler_tiers.label: Dune Messiah
spoiler_tiers.description: The cost of the holy war. Paul's fate.

spoiler_tiers.label: Everything
spoiler_tiers.description: Children of Dune and beyond. No limits.

canon_sources.label: Children of Dune (Frank Herbert)
canon_sources.description: Third novel. Leto II and Ghanima.

canon_sources.label: Dune: Part One (2021)
canon_sources.description: Denis Villeneuve adaptation. Faithful to book 1 part 1.

canon_sources.label: Dune: Part Two (2024)
canon_sources.description: Denis Villeneuve adaptation. Book 1 part 2 with some changes.
